extracted.title: Completed-Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated (April 22, 2026)
extracted.description:
Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers that the Construction and Maintenance activity listed below has been completed. Capacity will be restored effective ID1 for gas day April 22.

Completed: Glen Ullin Station 6 – Bison XP ESD testing and elbow replacement

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions regarding nominations or scheduling at (866) 581-6487.
